description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface. The grooves are deep and create a striped pattern, giving the block a distinctive, industrial appearance. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with a matte black finish that contrasts with the slightly lighter, textured surface of the grooved top. The block appears dense and heavy, likely made from a solid stone or concrete material. There are no visible markings, engravings, or signs of significant weathering on the surfaces. Its robust construction suggests it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, such as a sidewalk or plaza.
description: A heavy, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, matte black sides. The block has an industrial, urban look and appears very solid and durable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the block's wide face and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the grooves running vertically from this perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the full width and the horizontal grooves on the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical grooves and the block's thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or directly on a leveled ground surface
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or erosion; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
